expectations.evidence: Round 1 found 13 issues including 6 blockers. Identified all 4 original tasks as lacking acceptance criteria, payload format, retry params.
Took 3 rounds (13 -> 3 -> 0 issues). Healthy convergence pattern.
Final plan has 9 tasks with explicit acceptance criteria, defined payload schema with HMAC signing, retry config, error handling, risk table, rollback strategy.
